description_long: This is a large, two-story residential house set within a spacious, fenced lot surrounded by dense trees and landscaping. The house features a prominent central entryway with a path leading from a front gate, flanked by manicured lawns and garden beds. The structure has a dark, gabled roof and white exterior walls, with symmetrical window arrangements on both floors. In the backyard, there is a rectangular swimming pool with a paved deck and outdoor seating areas, as well as additional garden features and pathways. The property is enclosed by a white fence, providing privacy and a clear boundary. The overall setting suggests a suburban or upscale urban neighborhood with ample outdoor amenities.
description: A large, two-story house with a gabled roof, white exterior, and symmetrical windows, set in a landscaped, fenced lot with a pool and gardens.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry path, central doorway, symmetrical windows, and landscaped front yard with trees and gardens.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard swimming pool, patio area, and dense tree coverage around the property.
description_view_2: Side/rear angle showing the house's roofline, side windows, and the extent of tree coverage along the property boundary.
description_view_3: Side view with dense trees obscuring much of the house, but the roof and some garden features are visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with steps, a prominent door, and a straight path flanked by landscaping; no porch but a formal, balanced approach.
